content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.collective.deliberation
FILE: cosmos/core/collective/deliberation.py (529 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Collective Deliberation Protocol
============================================

Transform the swarm from parallel API calls into TRUE deliberative intelligence
where agents can see each other's responses, discuss, critique, and vote.

"We are not just many voices. We are one conversation." - T

CLASSES:
- DeliberationRound(Enum): The phases of deliberation.
- AgentTurn: One agent's contribution to deliberation.
- DeliberationResult: Complete result of a deliberation session.
  Methods: def get_summary(self) -> str
  Methods: def get_agent_contributions(self, agent_id: str) -> list[AgentTurn]
- DeliberationRoom: Enable agents to see and discuss each other's responses.

The room manages the d
  Methods: def register_agent(self, agent_id: str, query_func: AgentQueryFunc)
  Methods: async def deliberate(self, prompt: str, agents: list[str]=None, max_rounds: int=3, require_consensus

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_deliberation_room() -> DeliberationRoom
- async def quick_deliberate(prompt: str, agents: list[str]=None, max_rounds: int=2) -> str
